questionText: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q2][hard] Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "WITH channel_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        so.Channel,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS total_orders,
        COUNT(s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS order_lines,
        AVG(s."Sales Amount") AS avg_line_amount,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
        SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS total_cost
    FROM Sales s
    JOIN Sales_Order so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
    WHERE so.Channel IN ('Reseller', 'Internet')
    GROUP BY so.Channel
),
total_revenue_all AS (
    SELECT SUM(total_revenue) AS total_all
    FROM channel_sales
)
SELECT 
    cs.Channel,
    cs.total_revenue,
    ROUND((cs.total_revenue / tra.total_all) * 100, 2) AS revenue_share_pct,
    cs.total_orders,
    cs.order_lines,
    ROUND(cs.avg_line_amount, 2) AS avg_line_amount,
    ROUND((cs.gross_profit / cs.total_cost) * 100, 2) AS gross_margin_pct
FROM channel_sales cs
CROSS JOIN total_revenue_all tra
ORDER BY cs.total_revenue DESC;"}

questionLabel: [Q10][hard] Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "WITH sales_with_date AS (
    SELECT 
        s.SalesOrderLineKey,
        s.ResellerKey,
        s.CustomerKey,
        s.ProductKey,
        s.OrderDateKey,
        s.SalesTerritoryKey,
        s."Order Quantity",
        s."Unit Price",
        s."Extended Amount",
        s."Product Standard Cost",
        s."Total Product Cost",
        s."Sales Amount",
        s."Unit Price Discount Pct",
        so.Channel,
        p.Category,
        d."Fiscal Year"
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
    JOIN "Product" p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
    JOIN "Date" d ON s.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
),
yearly_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel,
        Category,
        "Fiscal Year",
        SUM("Sales Amount") AS revenue
    FROM sales_with_date
    GROUP BY Channel, Category, "Fiscal Year"
),
years_with_lag AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel,
        Category,
        "Fiscal Year",
        revenue,
        LAG("Fiscal Year") OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY "Fiscal Year") AS prior_year,
        LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY "Fiscal Year") AS prior_revenue
    FROM yearly_sales
)
SELECT 
    Channel,
    Category,
    prior_year,
    prior_revenue,
    "Fiscal Year" AS current_year,
    revenue AS current_revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN prior_revenue IS NOT NULL AND prior_revenue != 0 
        THEN ((revenue - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue) * 100 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS yoy_growth_pct
FROM years_with_lag
WHERE prior_year IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY Channel, Category, prior_year ASC;"}

questionLabel: [Q21][hard] Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "WITH SalesData AS (
    SELECT 
        so.Channel,
        p.Category,
        SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
        AVG(p."List Price") AS avg_list_price,
        SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS total_product_cost
    FROM Sales s
    JOIN Sales_Order so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
    JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
    GROUP BY so.Channel, p.Category
)
SELECT 
    Channel,
    Category,
    total_revenue,
    units_sold,
    total_revenue / NULLIF(units_sold, 0) AS revenue_per_unit,
    avg_list_price,
    (avg_list_price - (total_revenue / NULLIF(units_sold, 0))) / avg_list_price * 100 AS realized_discount_pct,
    total_revenue - total_product_cost AS gross_profit,
    ((total_revenue - total_product_cost) / total_revenue) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM SalesData
ORDER BY Channel ASC, total_revenue DESC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "WITH SalesWithDate AS (
    SELECT 
        s.SalesOrderLineKey,
        s.ResellerKey,
        s.CustomerKey,
        s.ProductKey,
        s.OrderDateKey,
        s.SalesTerritoryKey,
        s."Order Quantity",
        s."Unit Price",
        s."Extended Amount",
        s."Product Standard Cost",
        s."Total Product Cost",
        s."Sales Amount",
        s."Unit Price Discount Pct",
        so.Channel,
        p.Category,
        d."Fiscal Year",
        d."Fiscal Quarter",
        d."Month",
        d."MonthKey",
        d."Full Date"
    FROM Sales s
    JOIN Sales_Order so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
    JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
    JOIN "Date" d ON s.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
),
QuarterlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel,
        Category,
        "Fiscal Year",
        "Fiscal Quarter",
        SUM("Sales Amount") AS revenue
    FROM SalesWithDate
    GROUP BY Channel, Category, "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter"
),
RankedQuarters AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel,
        Category,
        "Fiscal Year",
        "Fiscal Quarter",
        revenue,
        LAG("Fiscal Quarter") OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter") AS prior_quarter,
        LAG("Fiscal Year") OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter") AS prior_year,
        LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter") AS prior_revenue
    FROM QuarterlyRevenue
)
SELECT 
    Channel,
    Category,
    prior_quarter,
    prior_revenue,
    "Fiscal Quarter" AS current_quarter,
    revenue AS current_revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN prior_revenue IS NOT NULL AND prior_revenue != 0 
        THEN ((revenue - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue) * 100 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS qoq_growth_pct
FROM RankedQuarters
WHERE prior_quarter IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY Channel, Category, prior_quarter;"}

Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH SalesWithDate AS (
    SELECT 
        s.SalesOrderLineKey,
        s.ResellerKey,
        s.CustomerKey,
        s.ProductKey,
        s.OrderDateKey,
        s.SalesTerritoryKey,
        s."Order Quantity",
        s."Unit Price",
        s."Extended Amount",
        s."Product Standard Cost",
        s."Total Product Cost",
        s."Sales Amount",
        s."Unit Price Discount Pct",
        so.Channel,
        p.Category,
        d."Fiscal Year",
        d."Fiscal Quarter",
        d."Month",
        d."MonthKey",
        d."Full Date"
    FROM Sales s
    JOIN Sales_Order so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
    JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
    JOIN "Date" d ON s.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
),
QuarterlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel,
        Category,
        "Fiscal Year",
        "Fiscal Quarter",
        SUM("Sales Amount") AS revenue
    FROM SalesWithDate
    GROUP BY Channel, Category, "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter"
),
RankedQuarters AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel,
        Category,
        "Fiscal Year",
        "Fiscal Quarter",
        revenue,
        LAG("Fiscal Quarter") OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter") AS prior_quarter,
        LAG("Fiscal Year") OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter") AS prior_year,
        LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter") AS prior_revenue
    FROM QuarterlyRevenue
)
SELECT 
    Channel,
    Category,
    prior_quarter,
    prior_revenue,
    "Fiscal Quarter" AS current_quarter,
    revenue AS current_revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN prior_revenue IS NOT NULL AND prior_revenue != 0 
        THEN ((revenue - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue) * 100 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS qoq_growth_pct
FROM RankedQuarters
WHERE prior_quarter IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY Channel, Category, prior_quarter;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "WITH subcategory_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        p.Category,
        p.Subcategory,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
        SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit
    FROM Sales s

),
category_revenue AS (

        SUM(revenue) AS category_total_revenue
    FROM subcategory_revenue
    GROUP BY Category
),
ranked_subcategories AS (
    SELECT
        sr.Category,
        sr.Subcategory,
        sr.revenue,
        sr.units_sold,

        cr.category_total_revenue,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sr.Category ORDER BY sr.revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank
    FROM subcategory_revenue sr
    JOIN category_revenue cr ON sr.Category = cr.Category
)
SELECT
    Category,
    revenue_rank,
    Subcategory,
    revenue,
    units_sold,
    gross_profit,
    ROUND((revenue / category_total_revenue) * 100, 2) AS category_revenue_share_pct

ORDER BY Category ASC, revenue_rank ASC, Subcategory ASC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "WITH sales_data AS (
    SELECT 
        st."Group" AS "Group",

    FROM sales_data sd
)
SELECT 
    rc."Group",
    rc."Fiscal Year",
    rc."Channel" AS top_channel,
    rc.revenue AS channel_revenue,

FROM ranked_channels rc
